The '''Istari''' (Quenya: "wise ones"), known in the Common Speech as '''Wizards''', are five Maiar spirits sent to [[Middle-earth]] by the Valar around T.A. 1000 to counsel and assist the free peoples in their struggle against [[Sauron]]. They were given the forms of old men and were forbidden from directly using their full power or seeking to dominate the peoples they were sent to help.

== The Five Wizards ==
* '''[[Saruman]]''' (Curunír) — the White, head of the order, who fell to corruption.
* '''[[Gandalf]]''' (Olórin) — the Grey, later the White after [[Saruman]]'s fall. The most faithful to his mission.
* '''Radagast''' (Aiwendil) — the Brown, devoted to the animals and plants of [[Middle-earth]].
* '''Alatar''' and '''Pallando''' — the Blue Wizards, who went into the east. Their fate is unknown.

[[Category:Istari]]
